ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the client belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who uploaded the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded data */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file uploaded (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the risk assessment was performed */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the risk assessment (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment the recommendation is based on */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the recommendation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, in_progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES risk_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor (e.g., application_security) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the factor (e.g., technical, administrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factor_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor value */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment the factor value is for */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the factor being measured */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the factor (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the factor value (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_values_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_values_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES risk_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factor_descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor description */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the factor being described */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_descriptions_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factor_severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor severity */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the factor being measured */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the factor (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_severities_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment being audited */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation being audited */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete, insert) */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES recommendations ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES risk_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., risk_assessment, recommendation) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
